stemHtml: The capacity of a battery is the…

options.a: no-load voltage of the battery multiplied by its rated output current.
options.b: amount of Ampere-hour (Ah) that a fully charged battery can supply.
options.c: intensity withstood by the battery during charging.
options.d: number of cycles (charging and discharging) that a battery can withstand without deterioration of its cells.
